name: ​Nimble
description:
__POSSIBLE_UNTRANSLATED__

What Nimble Does

Nimble is built for relationship-first agencies. If your growth strategy relies on networking, local chamber events, and high-touch outreach, Nimble is a strong fit. It is a social CRM that lives inside your inbox. Compared to Vcita’s more structured approach, Nimble feels more fluid, pulling in context from LinkedIn, X, and email history so you have a complete picture of each contact before you hit send.

Source: G2

Key Features

  • Unified Email Marketing Suite: Now includes a built-in HTML Drag-and-Drop Editor and AI Intent Message Generator. Supports unlimited email sends (bypassing the typical 500-2,000/day provider limits) when using the Nimble Email Marketing add-on ($15/month).
  • Robust contact management (ORM - Object/Relationship Management): Automatically builds contact records, enriching them with social/business data, and syncing with Microsoft 365/Google Workspace.
  • Nimble Prospector: A browser extension that auto-enriches contact records with data like company revenue, industry, and executive social handles.

​Benefits of Nimble

  • Cost Reduction: By consolidating CRM, Email Marketing, and Social Listening, agencies can save an average of $200+ per month in SaaS subscriptions.
  • Zero-Admin Maintenance: Nimble automatically maps every email, meeting, and social interaction to a single timeline. It boasts a 99% "plan to renew" score because it eliminates the manual data entry that kills most CRM adoption.
  • Immediate ROI: Most users see measurable outreach results within the first 30 days, thanks to AI-assisted prospecting tools.

​Pricing

  • ​Nimble Business: $29.90/user/month.

Nimble offers discounts when you choose to be billed annually.

​Pros

​✅ Best-in-class social media and contact enrichment.

✅ Very low barrier to entry for small teams who hate complex software.

​Cons

​🚫 No built-in fulfillment tools for agency services (Listings, SEO, etc.).

🚫 Limited invoicing and payment features.

‍
what_people_say:
__POSSIBLE_UNTRANSLATED__

What Customers Say

​”As a small business owner, I have tried several software programs to help me keep an up-to-date and comprehensive contact process with both current clients and potential leads. This program stood out for being intuitive, fairly easy to use, and it fulfilled all of my requirements. What's more is that this is relatively inexpensive, and they are particularly sensitive to small business operations.”

- Review collected by and hosted on G2.com.

‍
